title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Recruitment
text:
| 29/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
| Memo for hired Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 | Memo for hired Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 and updating of NPR are hereby discontinued w.e.f the afternoon of 31st August 2020 for the time being. | 29/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
